title: Create Indestructible
description: A create addon that allows the user to create indestructible blocks through a strenuous manufacturing process.
body:
### A mod by cyber.98
This mod is highly in development, so any feedback is appreciated.
This mod allows users to create indestructible blocks with the create mod through a complex manufacturing process.
**If you need to know any specific recipes: USE JEI!!** (please)
## Features
- A way to create blocks that are only breakable by the player who places them (other than with glitches)
- A way to create diamonds so that they are renewable
- A way to create lapis so that it is renewable.
- New items and blocks for in between and processing
- 4 new items/blocks

## Supported languages
- English (US)
- English (UK)
- Pirate Speak
(If you'd like to contribute a translation, contact me on discord! `cyber.98`)
## Things to note
- **All textures are not final! I just wanna get this mod out there so people can bugreport before it is done.**

- **The manufacturing process(es) will be changed as its fairly unbalanced**
